changeSet.author: angshu, pratiti

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM concept WHERE uuid = '280cbf8c-aff5-4753-a281-61e14d2c622a'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM concept WHERE uuid = '280cbf8c-aff5-4753-a281-61e14d2c622a' AND is_set = 1

changeSet.comment: mark vaccination body site concept as a set (280cbf8c-aff5-4753-a281-61e14d2c622a)
changeSet.sql: UPDATE concept SET is_set = 1 WHERE uuid = '280cbf8c-aff5-4753-a281-61e14d2c622a';

changeSet.author: angshu, pratiti

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM concept WHERE uuid = '280cbf8c-aff5-4753-a281-61e14d2c622a'

changeSet.comment: add answers as set members for vaccination body site (280cbf8c-aff5-4753-a281-61e14d2c622a)
